---
pagetitle: "Publications"
toc: false
page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Publications</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

**IEEE Copyright Notice**: Personal use of this material is permitted. For any other use, including reprinting, republishing, redistribution, or incorporation into other works, prior permission must be obtained from IEEE.

The most up-to-date publication can be found on my [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=wgsX_zIAAAAJ){.text-primary .text-decoration-none .fw-bolder}  profile.


**Journals**

library(RefManageR)

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a) || length(a) == 0) b else a

has_text <- function(x) {
  !is.null(x) && length(x) > 0 && !is.na(x[1]) && nzchar(trimws(as.character(x)[1]))
}

clean_text <- function(x) {
  if (!has_text(x)) return(NA_character_)
  y <- as.character(x)[1]
  y <- gsub("[{}]", "", y)
  trimws(y)
}

make_link <- function(label, href) {
  if (!has_text(href)) return(NULL)
  paste0('<a href="', href, '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">[', label, ']</a>')
}

doi_url <- function(entry) {
  doi <- clean_text(entry$doi)
  url <- clean_text(entry$url)
  if (!is.na(doi)) return(paste0("https://doi.org/", doi))
  if (!is.na(url)) return(url)
  NA_character_
}

code_url <- function(entry) {
  code <- clean_text(entry$code %||% entry$Code %||% entry$materials)
  if (!is.na(code)) return(code)
  NA_character_
}

pdf_url <- function(entry) {
  pdf <- clean_text(entry$pdf)
  if (!is.na(pdf)) return(pdf)
  NA_character_
}

preprint_url <- function(entry) {
  pre <- clean_text(entry$preprint)
  if (!is.na(pre)) return(pre)
  NA_character_
}

entry_year <- function(entry) {
  y <- clean_text(entry$year)
  if (!is.na(y)) return(y)

  d <- clean_text(entry$date)
  if (!is.na(d)) {
    m <- regmatches(d, regexpr("[0-9]{4}", d))
    if (length(m) > 0 && nzchar(m)) return(m)
  }

  ""
}

format_entry_text <- function(entry) {
  txt <- format(entry, style = "text")
  txt <- paste(txt, collapse = " ")
  txt <- gsub("\\s+", " ", txt)
  trimws(txt)
}

render_section <- function(entries) {
  cat("<ol>\n")
  for (entry in entries) {
    txt <- format_entry_text(entry)

    links <- c(
      make_link("DOI", doi_url(entry)),
      make_link("PDF", pdf_url(entry)),
      make_link("Preprint", preprint_url(entry)),
      make_link("Python Code", code_url(entry))
    )
    links <- links[!vapply(links, is.null, logical(1))]

    cat("<li>", txt)
    if (length(links) > 0) {
      cat(" ", paste(links, collapse = " "))
    }
    cat("</li>\n")
  }
  cat("</ol>\n")
}

bib <- ReadBib("publications.bib", check = FALSE)
types <- tolower(as.character(bib$bibtype))
yrs <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(vapply(bib, entry_year, character(1))))

journals <- bib[types %in% c("article")]
if (length(journals) > 0) {
  journals <- journals[order(yrs[types %in% c("article")], decreasing = TRUE, na.last = TRUE)]
  render_section(journals)
}

**Conferences**

confs <- bib[types %in% c("inproceedings", "proceedings", "conference")]
if (length(confs) > 0) {
  confs <- confs[order(yrs[types %in% c("inproceedings", "proceedings", "conference")], decreasing = TRUE, na.last = TRUE)]
  render_section(confs)
}
